raw_consumer_statement:
I reported fraud on my Citi Double Cash Card on XX/XX/year>. I locked my account and requested a new card to be sent. I disputed several charges on that day, specifically including XXXX charges to XXXX that were unauthorized and not made by me for {$530.00} each or {$1000.00} total. 

As of XX/XX/year>, the disputes were marked as " You're in the clear '' and that the merchant issued credit and my dispute for the XXXX {$530.00} transactions is " resolved ''. 

As of XX/XX/year> I spoke to another customer service representative and they informed me that it can take up to XXXX  days for my account to receive the merchant credit which is my money not Citi 's. They have not provided an update and there is no indication that my account will receive this credit or that I will not be liable for the fraudulent charge.
